response:
I don't have real-time data access, so I can't provide today's current date.

To get the accurate date, please check:
- Your device's clock (phone, computer, etc.)
- A trusted time website like time.is or worldtimeserver.com

As of my last knowledge update in July 2024, my system does not track live dates. Let me know if you need help with anything else!
